NEO-Sentient

Bitcoin Ordinals Collection

Enter the realm of artificial consciousness with NEO-Sentient, a groundbreaking Bitcoin ordinals collection. Each of the 3333 unique NEO-Sentients represents a digital entity on the brink of self-awareness, eternally inscribed on the Bitcoin blockchain.

Features:

  • 3333 unique AI entities
  • Fully on-chain artwork
  • Dynamic, code-generated designs
  • Each NEO-Sentient evolves based on its ordinal number

NEO-Sentient pushes the boundaries of digital art and blockchain technology. By owning a NEO-Sentient, you're not just collecting an image, you're becoming a custodian of a unique digital consciousness.

Join us in exploring the future of artificial sentience and digital ownership.

Mint Now
